name: climate_change
description: Climate Change dashboard: React+TS frontend, Node+TS backend, Flask ML service

scripts.build: npm run build -w @climate/frontend && npm run build -w @climate/backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @climate/frontend && npm run lint -w @climate/backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @climate/frontend && npm run typecheck -w @climate/backend
